brief_summary: Three trend lines on a single time-axis for the eight-week window ending W19 2026. Bordeaux emphasized: Alice at -18, sloping down. Warm-grey secondary: Mode Designs +24 and Gateron Oil King +42, sloping up. Zero baseline drawn through the middle. Caption: 'not a collapse — out-gravitated'.
data_sources: alice-layout-decline.mdx § lede + 'What the data is showing' — '2026-W19 pegs Alice movement at -18 and trending down ... the same week has Mode Designs up 24 percent and the Gateron Oil King up 42'
